calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Continued To Mar-20-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

(Amended) Ntc Of Demurrer To Complaint And Pos
Off Calendar Dec-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margarita Calpotura (415-675-3400) of Bryan Cave for BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A., defendants and moving parties / Jason W. Estavillo (510-982-3001) of Law Office of Jason W. Estavillo for Josey Russell, plaintiff and opposing party

Both sides submit to the tentative. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANTs BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s Amended Demurrer To Complaint is sustained with leave to amend: First (1st) cause of action of violaiton of CCC 2923.5 to allege in good faith Defendant's violation of "due diligence: requirements. Second (2nd), 3rd, and 4th causes of action to allege all elements of these causes of action and tender. Fifth (5th) to allege present controversy non-duplicative of other causes of action and to re-allege injunctive relief as remedy. Prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jason W. Estavillo (510-982-3001) of Law Office of Jason W. Estavillo for Josey Russell, plaintiff and moving party / Margarita Calpotura (415-675-3400) of Bryan Cave for BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A., defendants and opposing parties

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument takes Plaintiff's Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction under submission. Temporary Restraining Order to remain in effected until ordered otherwise. Defendant submitted a proposed order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Continued To Dec-14-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

(Amended) Ntc Of Demurrer To Complaint And Pos
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Continued To Dec-14-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Continued To Nov-28-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jason W. Estavillo (510-982-3001) of Law Office of Jason W. Estavillo for Josey Russell, plaintiff and moving party / Margarita Calpotura (415-675-3400) of Bryan Cave for Bank of America, defendant and opposing party

HEARING - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral orders Plaintiff Josey Russell's Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction continued to NOV-28-2012 @9:30 AM. All prior orders to remain in effect. Both sides are ordered to submit supplemental briefing on CC2923.5. Defendant's supplemental brief is due on NOV-09-2012; Pliantiff's response is due on NOV-21-2012, no reply. If the court wishes supplemental briefing on the issue regarding bankruptcy the parties will be notified and the same briefing schedule will be used. Defendant to prepare order. Judge Ronald E.
